description:
Comprehensive monitoring dashboard for Claude Code CLI usage. Track sessions, tokens, costs, commits, pull requests, lines of code, and developer productivity metrics. Compatible with Prometheus, VictoriaMetrics, Mimir, and Thanos.

Metrics required:
- claude_code_session_count_total
- claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total
- claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total
- claude_code_active_time_seconds_total
- claude_code_lines_of_code_count_total
- claude_code_commit_count_total
- claude_code_pull_request_count_total
- claude_code_code_edit_tool_decision_total

For metric collection setup, see: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code

panels.description: Total number of Claude Code sessions started in the selected time range
panels.title: Sessions

panels.description: Number of unique users who used Claude Code in the selected time range
panels.title: Users

panels.description: Total estimated cost in USD based on token usage and model pricing
panels.title: Total Cost

panels.description: Total tokens consumed including input, output, cache read, and cache creation tokens
panels.title: Total Tokens

panels.description: Total git commits created using Claude Code
panels.title: Commits

panels.description: Total pull requests created using Claude Code
panels.title: Pull Requests

panels.description: Total lines of code added by Claude Code
panels.title: Lines Added

panels.description: Total lines of code removed by Claude Code
panels.title: Lines Removed

panels.description: Time breakdown: 'cli' = time Claude Code is processing, 'user' = time waiting for user input
panels.title: Active Time

panels.description: Token usage by type: input (prompt), output (response), cacheRead (from cache), cacheCreation (added to cache)
panels.title: Tokens by Type

panels.description: Tool edit decisions: 'accept' = user accepted the edit, 'reject' = user rejected the edit
panels.title: Tool Decisions

panels.description: Estimated cost rate over time (USD per hour)
panels.title: Cost Over Time

panels.description: Cost breakdown by Claude model (e.g., claude-opus-4-6, claude-haiku-4-5)
panels.title: Cost by Model

panels.description: Token consumption rate by type (input, output, cacheRead, cacheCreation)
panels.title: Token Usage by Type

panels.description: Token consumption rate by Claude model
panels.title: Token Usage by Model

panels.description: Number of Claude Code sessions started over time
panels.title: Sessions Over Time

panels.description: Active time per hour: 'cli' = Claude Code processing time, 'user' = user interaction time
panels.title: Active Time (per hour)

panels.description: Lines of code modified by Claude Code per hour
panels.title: Lines of Code (per hour)

panels.description: User decisions on Claude Code tool suggestions (accept vs reject)
panels.title: Tool Decisions Over Time

panels.description: Top 10 users ranked by total cost in the selected time range
panels.title: Top Users by Cost

panels.description: Top 10 users ranked by total token consumption
panels.title: Top Users by Tokens

panels.description: Top 10 repositories ranked by total cost
panels.title: Top Repos by Cost

panels.description: Cost distribution across different Claude models
panels.title: Cost by Model

panels.description: Distribution of tool usage across programming languages
panels.title: Tool Usage by Language

panels.description: Distribution of sessions across terminal types (VS Code, iTerm, etc.)
panels.title: Sessions by Terminal

title: Claude Code Metrics
